active.name: Albumin 25% — 8 g per liter of fluid removed (large-volume drainage)
active.details: Standing peri-procedural order for large-volume paracentesis/thoracentesis to prevent post-paracentesis circulatory dysfunction.

completed.details: Therapeutic; ascitic fluid analysis (cell count/differential, albumin, culture). No blood products ordered.

completed.details: Ultrasound-guided; pleural fluid studies. No blood products ordered.
